tweets.name: Solana
tweets.content:
Collectors spent hundreds of millions on digital cards, a public company tokenized its shares, and builders shipped security, lending, and infrastructure across every layer of the network.

Another week of Solana reshaping how value moves:

📰 Headline News

- @SolanaFndn established STRIDE and SIRN to enforce DeFi security, providing 24/7 threat monitoring and formal verification for high-TVL protocols

- @Securitize partnered with Currenc Group (Nasdaq: CURR) to tokenize its shares on Solana

- Pokémon TCG gacha spend on Solana surpassed $233.8M in Q1 2026

- @bitget introduced IPO Prime on Solana, starting with a SpaceX preSPAX token sale powered by @joinrepublic

📰 Launches

- @Titan_Exchange deployed DART Routing, a decentralized matching engine enforcing price priority to guarantee Best Bid Offer execution

- @colosseum kicked off the Frontier Hackathon with a $2.5M venture pool

- @MetaMask unlocked Solana USDC spending on MetaMask Card across the U.S. via @Mastercard

- @USDC enabled cross-chain forwarding to Solana for Circle CCTP and Bridge Kit

- @MeteoraAG released a unified Portfolio dashboard for LP positions tracking

- @Loopscale activated Deposit-Backed Lending with @JupiterExchange lending positions as collateral

- @harmonic_gg upgraded with streaming block delivery, configurable scheduling strategies, and two validator clients

- @Alchemy launched a $20M infrastructure fund for Solana builders with up to $25K credits per team

- @perena integrated ZK-powered Proof of Reserves for USD Star, enabling privacy-preserving verification

- @kamino implemented Whitelisted Reserves to secure Lending Vaults

- @superteam presented https://t.co/hIJ44roHJa, a @sendaifun-powered dev kit packing 150+ skills, MCPs, and CLIs

- @sns opened .sol site to public, turning any .sol domain into a live website

- @project0 incorporated @jup_lend, expanding its Solana lending coverage

- @clanker_world expanded to Solana with 78% creator fee share

- @IkonShopApp built a native Shopify integration for crypto checkout

- @Vistadex rolled out claim markets, turning public claims into live prediction market positions

- @blueprintAI unveiled Compactor, a tool to locate and consolidate forgotten wallet tokens into stablecoins

- @ManifestTrade launched permissionless options markets with calls and puts on any token

- @CodecOpenFlow debuted agent-first infrastructure with x402 payments on Solana

- @immunefi opened a $1M audit competition for @jump_firedancer's V1 code

- @dflow integrated into @EitherwayAI to enable one-prompt creation of agentic trading apps

- @MiloOnChains integrated the @tokens API, enabling its agents to analyze and execute trades across assets

- @pudgypenguins shipped PenguBot, an agentic trading companion on Telegram across Solana

- @krexa_xyz enabled uncollateralized lending on Solana for AI agents

- @zerion adopted @x402 on Solana for keyless, pay-per-request API access

📰 Milestones

- Total Solana monthly token holders hit a new all-time high of 167M

- @yield’s yoSOL crossed $1M TVL in three weeks of launch

- USDG market cap on Solana surpassed $1B

- @jup_mobile processed $890M in trading volume in March

- @MoonPayCommerce settled over $40M in single-payment volume since Oct 2025, with 88% on Solana

If you enjoyed this week’s newsletter, share with an RT!

tweets.name: toly 🇺🇸
tweets.content:
Raptor 3 is about to fly for the first time and it's a marvel of engineering

When it was unveiled, most people in aerospace really thought they were looking at an incomplete render and asked SpaceX to show the full engine

Turns out, that was the full engine. SpaceX had eliminated so many external components, pipes, and brackets that it barely looked real

Elon Musk's first principle in engineering:
"The best part is no part"

Raptor 3 packs more thrust, better efficiency, and radical simplification - all in one jaw-dropping package

tweets.content:
本周又将会是ai井喷的一周！

GPT6有消息说可能会在4.14号正式上线，如果消息准备，我们应该能在周三看到gpt6的全面介绍。从目前mythos和gpt5.4的比较来看，已经在全方面碾压了gpt5.4，如果openai再不更新大模型，就要被anthropic打惨了。
同时从周末的市场行情来看，目前anthropic的估值也已经正式反超了openai。今年开始anthropic的进步肉眼可见，确实很强。

xchat也将搭载grok在4.17号和大家见面，这也将是本周最受期待的一个即时通讯产品。虽然现在的即时通讯软件也都可以通过openclaw链接大模型，但是像xchat这样搭载自己研发的大模型产品确实是第一次，期待一下马斯克团队能否带来新的东西。

具体内容请看视频！感谢大家点赞关注支持！谢谢

tweets.name: Vic TALK
tweets.content:
山寨币又进化了新的玩法。

之前由于散户很多，是新增市场。所以讲一个新故事，聊一个新概念，发一个新币，只要能上几个核心所，就能稳定赚钱。

现在没有几个散户了，都是存量市场，剩下的都是聪明人，大家也明白项目方上所之后就是出货，所以基本上新币都没啥买盘了，上线就跌是共识。

那么现在这个市场上，什么人最多呢？是玩合约的人！随着市场走熊，很多之前不玩合约的人，从自己的原有领域，例如撸毛，打新，打狗等已经完全赚不到钱，但是还需要钱生活，所以不得不选择去合约上赌几波，这一赌就万劫不复了。

项目方和做市商正是看到了玩合约的人是目前存量市场中最多的，所以开始选择一些筹码高度集中，且上线了币安alpha，合约或者现货的项目开始集中控盘，几天内爆拉几倍或者几十倍，然后几天之内再砸下来。做的漂亮的做市商可能选择拉几倍然后砸个40%左右，吃相难看的直接就像sto一样拉十倍再砸回原点。

大家可以发现其实这些暴涨暴跌的币在现货上交易量真的不大，也就是大几千万美金最多，核心都是在合约上进行反复收割。

做市商和项目方有最多的筹码，交易所有所有对手盘的信息，存量市场中玩合约的人最多，这就是目前很多币暴涨暴跌的底层逻辑。

当然如果胆子大也完全可以按照上面的思路去寻找币安上的合适的项目，如果踩中一个也是最少十几倍的收益。但是在我看来，这只是项目方和做市商在流动性极度匮乏下的竭泽而渔罢了。

其实这套玩法也不算新，已经持续了有大半年了，原来这就是山寨季啊。

tweets.content: there is a palpable feeling of anxiety in the market when a coin keeps going up & its apparent ppl dont own enough
